name: METAPHYSEAL CHONDRODYSPLASIA

demographics.Distribution: more marked in lower limbs; mild involvement of hands + wrists

dominant_finding: metaphyseal flaring (Erlenmeyer flask deformity) extending into diaphysis
distribution: more marked in lower limbs; mild involvement of hands + wrists
discriminating_features: metaphyseal flaring (Erlenmeyer flask deformity) extending into diaphysis

general: metaphyseal flaring (Erlenmeyer flask deformity) extending into diaphysis
shortening of long bones with normal width
cupped + widened metaphyses with lucent defects
short middle phalanges + narrow distal phalanges becoming triangular and bullet-shaped
expanded irregular + fragmented metaphyses (unossified cartilage extending into
splaying of proximal + distal ends of long bones with thinned cortex
relative constriction of central portion of shafts
